name: Pro Dino Hunt VR: Jurassic Hunting World

reviews.review_description: Vision not as good as the video showed, there are no shadow, low resolution texture, maybe target for quest 2, hopeful will improve later. game play very basic, the good thing you can saw all Dinosaur like gallery, but graphic are simple mobile game level.

developer_response.body:
Hi Victorkin,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We really appreciate hearing from players like you, as it helps us improve the game.

The game is designed to be accessible across different platforms, including Quest 2, which does require some optimizations. That said, we’re always working to improve the graphics, textures, and overall gameplay. Your points about shadows and texture resolution are especially helpful, and we have started working on these points and you will see these improvements in our next update that is coming soon.

We’re also aware that the gameplay could be more engaging, and we’re actively exploring ways to enhance it and make it more dynamic in future updates.

It’s great to hear you enjoyed the ability to view the dinosaurs in gallery. We’re excited to keep building on features like this to make the experience even better. If you have any other suggestions or ideas, we’d love to hear them!

Thanks again for trying the game, and we hope you’ll check out future updates as we continue to improve.

Kind Regards.
Squad Cell Team.

reviews.review_description: Cool ideal but needs a load of work. Like a lot lot of work.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We're constantly working to improve the game, and your input helps us make it better. If you have specific suggestions on what you'd like to see improved, we'd love to hear them! Stay tuned for future updates as we continue to enhance the gameplay and overall experience. Thanks for giving our game a try!
